result.stdout:
Description:

Usage:
  RESTyard.Generator [options]

Options:
  --schema-file <schema-file> (REQUIRED)
  --template <template> (REQUIRED)        select the template to render the schema with. Available options:
                                          server
                                            /csharp
                                              /v4
                                              /v5
                                            /csharp-controller
                                              /v4
                                            /csharp-policies
                                              /v4
                                          client
                                            /csharp
                                              /v3
                                            /typescript
                                              /v0
  
                                          Example: --template server/csharp/v4
  --output-file <output-file> (REQUIRED)
  --namespace <namespace>
  --include-file <include-file>
  --include-type <include-type>
  --exclude-type <exclude-type>
  --version                               Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                          Show help and usage information
